members.statement: (n : ℕ) (m : ℕ) (xs : List α) (h1 : ((take_nil : ∀ (k : ℕ), take k [] = []) → (drop_nil : ∀ (k : ℕ), drop k [] = []) → drop n (take m []) = take (m - n) (drop n [])) ∧ ((k : ℕ) → take k [] = []) ∧ ((x : α) → (ih : ∀ (n m : ℕ), drop n (take m xs) = take (m - n) (drop n xs)) → drop (n + 1) (take m (x :: xs)) = take (m - (n + 1)) (drop (n + 1) (x :: xs)))) : drop n (take m xs) = take (m - n) (drop n xs)

clusters.canonical: (n : ℕ) (m : ℕ) (xs : List α) (h1 : ((take_nil : ∀ (k : ℕ), take k [] = []) → (drop_nil : ∀ (k : ℕ), drop k [] = []) → drop n (take m []) = take (m - n) (drop n [])) ∧ ∀ (k : ℕ), take k [] = [] ∧ ((take_nil : ∀ (k : ℕ), take k [] = []) → (k : ℕ) → drop 0 [] = [] ∧ drop (k + 1) [] = []) ∧ ((x : α) → (ih : ∀ (n m : ℕ), drop n (take m xs) = take (m - n) (drop n xs)) → drop n (take m (x :: xs)) = take (m - n) (drop n (x :: xs)))) : drop n (take m xs) = take (m - n) (drop n xs)

members.statement: (n : ℕ) (m : ℕ) (xs : List α) (h1 : ((take_nil : ∀ (k : ℕ), take k [] = []) → (drop_nil : ∀ (k : ℕ), drop k [] = []) → drop n (take m []) = take (m - n) (drop n [])) ∧ ∀ (k : ℕ), take k [] = [] ∧ ((take_nil : ∀ (k : ℕ), take k [] = []) → (k : ℕ) → drop 0 [] = [] ∧ drop (k + 1) [] = []) ∧ ((x : α) → (ih : ∀ (n m : ℕ), drop n (take m xs) = take (m - n) (drop n xs)) → drop n (take m (x :: xs)) = take (m - n) (drop n (x :: xs)))) : drop n (take m xs) = take (m - n) (drop n xs)
